ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pricing_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the pricing model (e.g., Simple Pricing, LP greedy utilitarian) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the pricing model (e.g., Simple, LP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pricing model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the model is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_models_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pricing model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "welfare" REAL /* Calculated welfare value for the model */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the model */,
  "efficiency_factor" REAL /* Efficiency factor associated with the model */,
  "efficiency_loss" REAL /* Loss of efficiency linked to the model */,
  "marginal_cost" REAL /* Marginal cost incurred by the model */,
  "marginal_cost_loss" REAL /* Loss of marginal cost associated with the model */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken for evaluation in seconds */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., simulation, historical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES pricing_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pricing model accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES pricing_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pricing model used in the simulation */,
  "simulation_data" TEXT /* Serialized data of the simulation result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome of the simulation */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was performed */,
  "simulated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulated_by FOREIGN KEY ("simulated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES pricing_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pricing model associated with the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES pricing_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pricing model the report is based on */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES pricing_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)
